source_pointer.quote_or_pointer: Page 11, article XV section F: employees required to change shift start time by more than one hour with less than one week notice receive an extra $1.00 per hour for all hours worked on that shift.

source_pointer.quote_or_pointer: Articles 21 and 24 state employer welfare-fund contributions and trustee-determined benefits; Article 24 also continues those contributions during certain leaves and absences.
